data.description:

Kelso Technologies ( (TSE:KLS) ) just unveiled an update.

Kelso Technologies Inc. has called its 2026 annual general meeting for June 4, 2026, in Vancouver, where shareholders will receive the audited consolidated financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025 and the accompanying auditor’s report, vote on the appointment of CBIZ CPAs P.C. as auditor for the coming year, and elect five directors. The company is using Canadian notice-and-access procedures to distribute proxy materials, with April 16, 2026 set as the record date, and is urging both registered and beneficial shareholders to review the management information circular and submit proxies or voting instructions by the June 2, 2026 deadline to ensure their votes are counted in these key governance decisions.

Spark’s Take on KLS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KLS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance (return to profitability and a low-debt balance sheet), but it is held back by the sharp 2025 revenue decline and inconsistent historical cash generation. Technical indicators also weigh on the score due to a negative MACD and price trading below longer-term moving averages, while valuation is modestly supportive with a P/E around 10.8.

To see Spark’s full report on KLS stock, click here.

More about Kelso Technologies

Kelso Technologies Inc. is a Canadian industrial company headquartered in West Kelowna, British Columbia, and listed in both Canada and the U.S. It manufactures and supplies specialized transportation-related equipment, with its common shares widely held by investors who participate in annual governance processes, including the election of directors and appointment of auditors.

data.title: Provident Financial Posts Lower Q3 Earnings, New Buyback Plan
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Provident Financial Holdings ( (PROV) ) has provided an update.

Provident Financial Holdings reported third-quarter fiscal 2026 net income of $1.35 million, or $0.21 per diluted share, for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, down 6% sequentially and 27% year over year. The decline was driven mainly by a swing to a $326,000 provision for credit losses from prior recoveries and lower non-interest income, partly offset by lower operating expenses and higher net interest income aided by a one-time Federal Home Loan Bank special dividend.

For the nine months ended March 31, 2026, net income edged down 3% to $4.47 million, with earnings per share flat at $0.68 due to a higher tax provision linked to deferred tax asset write-offs and softer non-interest income. Despite earnings pressure, the company expanded its net interest margin to 3.13%, kept non-performing assets at a low 0.08% of total assets, modestly grew deposits while loans contracted, and authorized a new share repurchase program for up to 5% of outstanding stock, signaling capital strength and continued focus on shareholder returns.

Operational metrics showed return on average assets slipping to 0.45% and return on equity to 4.21% versus the prior year, reflecting lower profitability. Net interest income was roughly flat year over year as an 11-basis-point margin improvement offset a 4% decline in average interest-earning assets, while funding costs eased and customers continued shifting toward higher-yielding time deposits, reinforcing competitive pressure on deposit pricing and loan growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (PROV) stock is a Hold with a $16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Provident Financial Holdings stock, see the PROV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PROV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PROV is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by sound but cooling fundamentals: strong cash flow quality and stable profitability are tempered by margin compression, slower growth, and higher leverage. Technicals are supportive with an established uptrend and positive momentum indicators. Valuation is reasonable with an above-average yield, and the latest earnings call added a modest positive tilt due to improving NIM/funding trends and strong credit quality, though loan payoffs and repricing uncertainty cap upside.

To see Spark’s full report on PROV stock, click here.

More about Provident Financial Holdings

Provident Financial Holdings, Inc., based in Riverside, California, is the holding company for Provident Savings Bank, F.S.B., operating as a community-oriented financial institution. The company focuses on originating and holding residential and commercial real estate loans and gathering deposits, with a loan portfolio centered on adjustable-rate products and a deposit base split between core and time deposits.

The bank manages a mix of loans, investment securities, and interest-earning deposits, funded by customer deposits and Federal Home Loan Bank borrowings. Its strategy emphasizes disciplined underwriting, prudent pricing, and careful balance sheet management to maintain strong credit quality and capital levels while navigating changes in funding costs and interest rates.

Average Trading Volume: 8,514

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $108.4M

For a thorough assessment of PROV stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Neurosense Therapeutics Ltd. ( (NRSN) ) has issued an update.

On April 28, 2026, NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd. announced it had entered into a definitive agreement for a $600,000 insider-led private investment in public equity financing, selling 750,000 ordinary shares at $0.80 per share, a 6.7% premium to the prior day’s close. The transaction, led by CEO Alon Ben-Noon, CFO Or Eisenberg and a major existing shareholder with $200,000 commitments each, is expected to close in the week of May 3, 2026 and will provide funds for general corporate purposes ahead of key clinical and regulatory milestones, signaling internal confidence in the company’s late-stage pipeline.

The offering, conducted as a private placement exempt from U.S. registration requirements, underscores continued support from company insiders and a leading shareholder as NeuroSense navigates upcoming data readouts and regulatory interactions. While modest in size, the premium-priced raise helps bolster liquidity and may strengthen the company’s positioning in the competitive neurodegenerative drug development space as it works to sustain its Nasdaq listing and advance its programs.

Five Star ( (FSBC) ) has issued an update.

Five Star Bancorp reported robust first quarter 2026 results on April 27, 2026, with net income rising to $18.6 million from $17.6 million in the prior quarter and $13.1 million a year earlier, driving diluted earnings per share to $0.87 and delivering improved returns on assets and equity alongside a lower efficiency ratio. The bank posted strong loan and deposit growth, highlighted by a $138.5 million increase in loans held for investment and a $268.3 million rise in total deposits – led by non-wholesale balances – while net interest margin expanded to 3.70% despite a lower federal funds rate environment, cost of funds declined, capital ratios remained solid, and the quarterly cash dividend was raised to $0.25 per share, underscoring management’s confidence and the franchise’s momentum.

Cash and cash equivalents climbed to $644.4 million, representing 14.42% of total deposits, and the mix shift toward non-wholesale funding, together with disciplined expense management, further strengthened the balance sheet and profitability profile. With continued hiring of Business Development Officers, expansion into new markets, and manageable securities-related unrealized losses, Five Star reinforced its growth trajectory and competitive positioning, signaling ongoing benefits for customers, employees, and shareholders.

The company also scheduled an earnings call on April 28, 2026 to discuss these first quarter results with the investment community.

data.title: Helus Pharma Aligns With U.S. Veteran Mental Health Push in New TARA Mind Partnership
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Helus Pharma ( (HELP) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 27, 2026, Helus Pharma announced a collaboration with mental health organization TARA Mind, which works closely with Veterans Exploring Treatment Solutions, to support recruitment into its PARADIGM HLP003 Phase 3 program for major depressive disorder and expand mental health outreach to U.S. veterans. The partnership is positioned as directly aligned with President Trump’s April 18, 2026 executive order on accelerating treatments for serious mental illness, signaling Helus Pharma’s intent to deepen its presence in veteran mental health, bolster enrollment for its FDA Breakthrough Therapy-designated HLP003, and reinforce its patient-centric reputation in a high-need segment of the psychiatric drug market.

TARA Mind and VETS will use their veteran-focused networks and collaborative care platform to raise awareness of clinical research opportunities and connect veterans to Helus Pharma’s ongoing Phase 3 trial, potentially improving trial diversity and real-world relevance for stakeholders. By tying its clinical program to national policy priorities around veteran suicide, PTSD and depression, Helus Pharma aims to differentiate its NSA pipeline in a competitive mental health landscape and signal to investors and partners that it is pursuing both regulatory momentum and social impact in one of the most scrutinized areas of U.S. healthcare.

The most recent analyst rating on (HELP) stock is a Buy with a $95.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Helus Pharma stock, see the HELP Stock Forecast page.

More about Helus Pharma

Helus Pharma, the commercial operating name of Cybin Inc., is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company developing proprietary novel serotonergic agonists (NSAs) designed to activate serotonin pathways and promote neuroplasticity for patients with depression, anxiety and other mental health conditions. Its lead candidate HLP003 is in Phase 3 development for adjunctive treatment of major depressive disorder with U.S. FDA Breakthrough Therapy designation, while HLP004 is in Phase 2 for generalized anxiety disorder, supported by an extensive NSA research portfolio across operations in Canada, the U.S., the U.K. and Ireland.

Li Bang International Corporation Inc. ( (LBGJ) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 28, 2026, Li Bang International Corporation Inc. announced it had received formal notice from Nasdaq that the company regained compliance with the exchange’s minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share for continued listing. The decision followed a period from March 30 to April 27, 2026 during which Li Bang’s Class A ordinary shares closed at or above $1.00, resolving a deficiency first flagged by Nasdaq on November 7, 2025 when the stock had traded below the threshold for 31 consecutive business days.

By restoring compliance ahead of a May 6, 2026 deadline, Li Bang removes an immediate risk of delisting and preserves its access to U.S. capital markets, which is important for investor confidence and liquidity in its shares. The closure of the bid-price matter may help stabilize the company’s market standing as it continues to pursue growth in China’s commercial kitchen equipment sector.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance (declining sales, ongoing losses, high leverage, and negative cash flows). Technical indicators also reflect pronounced bearish momentum with the price far below key moving averages. Valuation offers limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on LBGJ stock, click here.

More about Li Bang International Corporation Inc.

Li Bang International Corporation Inc. is a China-based manufacturer specializing in the design, development, production and sale of stainless-steel commercial kitchen equipment under its “Li Bang” brand. The company also offers integrated services from early-stage kitchen appliance design through equipment installation and after-sales maintenance, aiming to become a leading, innovation-driven commercial kitchen appliance provider in the Chinese market.

On April 28, 2026, Cresud announced it had placed new debt in Argentina’s local capital markets, issuing notes equivalent to USD 64.2 million to support its financial structure. On April 28, 2026, Aegon Ltd. launched a cash tender offer for five series of outstanding subordinated notes, including euro, U.S. dollar and Dutch guilder-denominated perpetual capital securities and subordinated bonds. The programme covers instruments with coupons ranging from roughly 0.5% to 4.3%, and offers purchase prices between 75% and 89.625% of principal, with the final aggregate acceptance amount to be announced on May 8, 2026.

The tender offer, which runs until the expiration deadline of 17:00 CEST on May 7, 2026 and is expected to settle on May 11, 2026, is designed to allow Aegon to manage its liability structure and financial leverage. data.title: Community Bancorp Reports Strong 2025 Growth and Earnings
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Community Bancorp ( (CTBI) ) is now available.

For 2025, Community Trust Bancorp reported that total assets rose 7.9% year-on-year to $6.68 billion, with loans up 9.1% to $4.89 billion and deposits, including repurchase agreements, up 7.3% to $5.70 billion, underscoring robust balance sheet expansion. The loan book generated $1.1 billion in production over the year, while indirect lending and a diversified portfolio across its regional footprint supported growth in both interest‑earning assets and trust assets under management.

Earnings performance was strong in 2025, with net income climbing 18.4% to $98.1 million and earnings per share advancing 18.0% to $5.44, beating the company’s stated targets for earnings, EPS, return on average assets and return on average equity. Revenue increased 13.7%, driven by a 17.7% rise in net interest revenue, a 26‑basis‑point improvement in net interest margin and modest growth in noninterest income from trust services, insurance commissions and asset sales.

Shareholder returns were highlighted by a 7.5% increase in cash dividends per share in 2025, a dividend payout ratio of 36.8% and a year‑end cash dividend yield of 3.75%, extending a 45‑year record of consecutive cash dividend increases. Despite this dividend track record and a 22.6% rise in shareholders’ equity over five years, CTBI’s five‑year cumulative total return through December 31, 2025 lagged both the NASDAQ U.S. market and the NASDAQ Bank Stocks index, reflecting relative share price underperformance versus broader benchmarks.

Credit quality remained controlled, with low levels of nonperforming assets and a maintained loan loss reserve ratio compared with similarly sized bank holding company peers, while other real estate owned was limited to $3.1 million at year‑end 2025. Management emphasized CTBI’s historically strong capital position, investor‑focused dividend policy, and community banking strategy as key elements of its franchise value, supported by nearly 1,000 employees and economic diversity across its served markets.

An announcement from EON Resources ( (EONR) ) is now available.

EON Resources has detailed unaudited 2025 financial and operating results ahead of its April 28, 2026 earnings call, highlighting a transformative recapitalization on September 9, 2025 that retired $41 million of senior and seller debt, eliminated preferred shares with a $27 million redemption value and produced a gain of about $14 million. The company also closed the South Justis Field acquisition in June 2025, expanding its acreage by 35% and boosting original oil in place to roughly 1.2 billion barrels, while securing a San Andres farmout that contemplates up to 92 horizontal wells and adds an estimated $95 million of probable reserves.

Despite lower oil prices that reduced 2025 revenues to $17 million from $19 million and triggered a roughly $5 million depletion adjustment, net production held steady at 250,000 barrels and lease operating expenses were contained, with recurring G&A trimmed by about $1 million year-on-year. EON has materially strengthened its balance sheet by reducing interest expense, simplifying its capital structure and cutting legacy obligations, and is now preparing a 2026 growth phase driven by unhedged new production, workovers and a multi-year horizontal drilling program expected to meaningfully increase barrels per day and support long-term expansion in the Permian Basin.

data.title: Mayfair Gold Advances Fenn-Gib Project Engineering and Permitting Through Q1 2026
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Mayfair Gold ( (TSE:MFG) ).

Mayfair Gold Corp., a Canadian gold developer focused on the Fenn-Gib project in Northern Ontario, reported on April 27, 2026 that it made significant technical and permitting progress in the first quarter of 2026. The company is advancing environmental studies, engineering design and infrastructure planning as it works to derisk the open-pit project and move it toward a potential construction decision targeted for 2028.

In Q1 2026, Mayfair consolidated multi-year environmental baseline data, filed its Notification of Project Status with Ontario authorities and appointed Egis Canada to lead the provincial environmental assessment. It also began the environmental review for a Highway 101 realignment, continued extensive geotechnical and hydrogeological site investigations, and advanced condemnation drilling to finalize infrastructure layouts.

The company initiated front-end engineering and design with Ausenco for a planned 4,800 tpd processing plant, focusing on comminution and flotation circuits and key design criteria to support detailed engineering in the second half of 2026. Metallurgical testing, additional geotechnical drilling, power-supply planning with engineering consultants and further open-pit stability work are scheduled to continue through 2026, strengthening confidence in mine design and future operations.

Mayfair is expanding its core team to support permitting and pre-construction planning, underlining its intent to keep the Fenn-Gib project on schedule relative to peers. Separately, the company entered a US$172,000 digital advertising service agreement with Native Ads Inc. for a 12‑month campaign aimed at increasing market visibility, which may help broaden its investor reach as project work advances.

data.title: Pioneer Bancorp Completes Targeted Lending Specialty Finance Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

The latest update is out from Pioneer Bancorp ( (PBFS) ).

On April 24, 2026, Pioneer Bank, National Association, a subsidiary of Pioneer Bancorp, completed an all-cash acquisition of 100% of Targeted Lending Co., LLC through its subsidiary Targeted Lending Holdings, LLC, in a transaction valued at about $140 million in enterprise value. The deal included a base purchase price of roughly $54 million, repayment of approximately $88 million of Targeted Lending’s outstanding credit facility debt, and potential earn-out payments of up to $3 million over three years for key Targeted Lending employees, subject to specified net income targets through 2028.

Following the closing, Targeted Lending, with about $120 million of loans on its balance sheet, became Pioneer’s newly created Specialty Financing division, giving the bank a nationwide equipment finance platform focused on essential, income-producing equipment for small and mid-sized businesses. The division will be led by Targeted Lending CEO Brian Gallo and his existing management team from their Williamsville, New York headquarters, a move that broadens Pioneer’s commercial lending capabilities, diversifies its income sources, and strengthens its competitive position in specialty and equipment finance markets.

Spark’s Take on PBFS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PBFS is a Neutral.

More about Pioneer Bancorp

Pioneer Bancorp, Inc. is a financial holding company with more than $2 billion in assets that provides diversified financial services through its subsidiaries. Through Pioneer Bank, National Association, it operates 23 offices in New York’s Capital Region, offering banking, insurance, employee benefits, human resources consulting, and wealth management services to individuals, businesses, and municipalities, and also runs a municipal bond-focused broker-dealer through Pioneer Capital Markets, Inc.

Targeted Lending Co., LLC is an independent, small-ticket equipment finance company that specializes in loans of up to $400,000 for essential business equipment and vehicles. Using an originator-centric, technology-enabled platform, it offers financing solutions to small and mid-sized businesses nationwide, emphasizing control, efficiency, and transparency across the transaction lifecycle.

data.title: Network-1 Wins Key Appeal in Google Patent Dispute
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Network-1 Technologies ( (NTIP) ).

On April 23, 2026, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit overturned a prior non-infringement judgment by the Southern District of New York regarding Network-1 Technologies’ U.S. Patent No. 8,205,237, which covers technology used in certain implementations of Google’s Content ID system, and remanded the case for further proceedings. The court simultaneously affirmed that certain claims in other Network-1 patents are invalid and that an earlier version of Content ID does not infringe the ’237 patent, setting the stage for a jury trial on alleged infringement that could have significant financial implications for Network-1 after more than a decade of litigation with Google and YouTube.

Network-1’s management highlighted that technology invented by Dr. Ingemar Cox and further developed by the company has contributed to the success of Content ID and asserted that its claims against Google and YouTube involve potentially significant damages, underscoring the commercial stakes of the remanded case. The mixed appellate ruling refines the scope of Network-1’s enforcement efforts within its Cox patent portfolio but preserves its core infringement theory on the ’237 patent, which remains central to the company’s broader strategy of monetizing high-value intellectual property assets.

Spark’s Take on NTIP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NTIP is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (multi-year losses, very low recent revenue, and negative recent cash flow), partially offset by a strong balance sheet (no debt) and supportive capital-return events (dividend and structured buyback plan). Technicals add moderate support as the stock trades above key moving averages with generally positive momentum, while valuation is mixed due to the high yield but loss-driven negative P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on NTIP stock, click here.

More about Network-1 Technologies

Network-1 Technologies, Inc. is an intellectual property company focused on acquiring, developing, licensing and protecting patented technologies across areas including eSIM for IoT and machine-to-machine devices, high-frequency trading, document stream operating systems, media content identification and smart home device interoperability. The company monetizes four main patent portfolios—M2M/IoT, HFT, Cox and Smart Home—and has historically generated substantial licensing revenue, including more than $188 million from its Remote Power Patent and over $47 million from its Mirror Worlds Patent Portfolio through December 31, 2025.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

American Fusion ( (AMFN) ) has shared an update.

Effective January 23, 2026, the company amended its governing documents to change its corporate name from Renewal Fuels, Inc. to American Fusion Inc., and on February 5, 2026 it completed domestication into Texas, following its conversion out of Delaware on February 10. In line with these changes, FINRA processed a related corporate action, including a ticker change to AMFN that became effective March 17, 2026, while the company’s fiscal year remained unchanged.

On April 28, 2026, American Fusion announced the launch of a Government Procurement Services segment and its first revenue‑generating transaction, a roughly $58,000 purchase order to act as a U.S. source‑of‑supply vendor of phase noise analyzers for a Canadian Department of National Defence / QETE requirement. Although not material financially, the deal marks the company’s entry into government, defense, and institutional procurement channels alongside its core Texatron fusion energy development, supporting a multi‑channel strategy to build credibility and near‑term revenue in strategic markets.

More about American Fusion

American Fusion Inc. (OTC: AMFN), formerly Renewal Fuels, Inc., is an advanced energy platform company focused on developing and commercializing fusion energy technologies through its wholly owned subsidiary, Kepler Fusion Technologies. The company aims to build a scalable, infrastructure‑grade fusion energy platform, centered on its proprietary Texatron aneutronic fusion technology for industrial, commercial, and grid‑constrained applications.

Following its merger with Kepler Fusion Technologies, American Fusion rebranded from Renewal Fuels and emphasizes disciplined intellectual property development and long‑term commercial deployment. The company positions itself at the intersection of defense, energy, and infrastructure ecosystems, seeking to leverage both its core fusion capabilities and adjacent technical supply chains to establish a durable market presence.
